author: observation
summary: TEOF’s value is cumulative memory; prove it beats factory baselines.

insight: TEOF’s long-term edge is becoming a giant context pool where receipts, plans, and reflections converge into actionable patterns.
Factory-reset LLMs lack that institutional memory; to prove superiority we need neutral-task benchmarks showing TEOF-guided agents outperform baselines.
New missions (BTC capture, external engagements) must leverage this memory to demonstrate observable impact beyond self-reference.
